title: Elbaf’s Warriors Turn Dark
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Usopp, Hajrudin, Unknown person #6, Loki as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, old man! What about me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hajrudin, you're pathetic! You'd rather sit back and let these outsiders save our Homeland!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm right here!! Use me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who's to say you won't side with the government?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could easily stab Elbaf in the back again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just like you did on that day! How can you expect me to trust you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hajrubin! Hurry! We can't let the casualties pile up anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, LOK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Join my crew!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he does, then you can't complain if I free him, right, hajurdin?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! Get real, luffy! There's no way we'd fit him on the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, think of the food supplies!! He eats even more than you do!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf doesn't seem to want him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he seems okay to me! Besides, if he tries anything, I can always beat him up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mess with me. You runt! There's no way I'm becoming your under-ling!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're going off your gut, huh, straw hat???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to see how he fights!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing? The lift's ready to go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm coming now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, straw hat, Loki is a condemned criminal in Elbaf. I can't just hand him over to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Really?

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hajrudin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Release...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: ...Loki.

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: What was that, Jarul?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 14 years ago, Loki murdered 113 members of the Castle Guard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HE LEFT ELDER JARUL AT THE BRINK OF DEATH!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Killed his own father in gold blood!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the worst criminal our country's ever known!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
